# Nested Lists

## Ordered with nesting

1. First item
2. Second item
   1. Nested item 2a
   2. Nested item 2b
3. Third item

## Unordered with nesting

- Alpha
  - Sub-alpha
    - Deep nesting
  - Another sub
- Beta
- Gamma

## Mixed nesting

1. Step one
   - Detail A
   - Detail B
2. Step two
   1. Sub-step 2.1
   2. Sub-step 2.2
